hero.title: Build biology with us
hero.subtitle: Protein design, AI-driven optimization, and biological discovery in one collaborative lab.
hero.heading: We are hiring graduate students, postdoc candidates, and undergrads
intro: We are building a team of motivated engineers and scientists who want to pursue fundamentally innovative ideas in biology in a multidisciplinary and collaborative research environment.

Lab members develop strong foundations in biochemistry and biophysics, ML and non-ML optimization, and practical computing. Projects often connect with collaborating groups in other universities, national labs, and industry, with room for conference participation and scientific ownership.
highlights: Collaborations across academia, national labs, and industry

items.title: Own meaningful problems
items.text: Work on questions with real scientific and translational relevance, from molecular design to environmental and health applications.

items.title: Learn across disciplines
items.text: Build skills spanning structural biology, biochemistry, modeling, optimization, and scientific programming.

items.title: Grow through collaboration
items.text: Projects can connect you with collaborators at other universities, national labs, and industry partners.

items.title: Present and publish
items.text: Strong projects can open opportunities for conference participation, scientific communication, and long-term research growth.

researchPreview.title: What you could work on
items: Image processing and biological data workflows

opportunities.title: Graduate students
opportunities.summary: Great for students who want depth in biological engineering, computational design, and quantitative research.
opportunities.body: If you are already in a graduate program (PhD/MS) at {iastate}, feel free to {email} Prof. Chowdhury directly. If you are planning to apply for a PhD program at Iowa State, we recommend the {cbe} / {microbiology} / {cs} PhD tracks.

opportunities.title: Postdoctoral fellows
opportunities.summary: Ideal for candidates ready to drive projects in structural protein biology, biochemistry, or molecular simulations.
opportunities.body: Candidates with experience in either structural protein biology and biochemistry, or molecular simulations are encouraged to apply. Please {email} your CV, research interests, references, and career plans after the postdoc.

opportunities.title: Undergraduate students
opportunities.summary: A strong fit for motivated students interested in coding, ML frameworks, and biological data-driven work.
opportunities.body: Motivated individuals familiar with programming with ML frameworks and interest in biological data are highly encouraged to apply. Please {email} us with your short CV, research interests, and coding experience.

apply.title: How to reach out
steps: Send a short email introducing yourself and the role you are interested in.
Attach your CV and include your research interests or technical background.
If relevant, mention programming experience, modeling experience, or coursework aligned with the lab’s work.
For graduate applicants, indicate the Iowa State program or track you are considering.
